name: Tiny Shelf Extensions
description: Optional extension trees that refine a base Tiny Shelf code without colliding with the main three-digit classification. Extensions are scoped to a parent code and can branch up to four levels deep.

children.label: Abrahamic Traditions
children.scopeNote: Use for works chiefly about abrahamic traditions within religion, including the Bible, scriptural traditions, Christianity, Judaism, and Islam.
